description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a bullpup configuration, featuring a compact and angular design. The main body is finished in a camouflage green with black accents, and it includes a prominent rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The rifle is equipped with a fixed stock integrated into the rear of the body, and a pistol grip is molded into the lower section. A red dot or holographic sight is mounted on the top rail, and the barrel is relatively short, ending with a cylindrical muzzle device. The underside of the barrel features an accessory, likely a tactical flashlight or laser module, enhancing its utility in urban environments.
description: A compact, bullpup-style tactical rifle with a camouflage green body, black accents, and a mounted sight. Features a short barrel, top rail, and an under-barrel accessory.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, camouflage body, top rail with mounted sight, and under-barrel accessory.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel profile, and the alignment of the sight and under-barrel accessory.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the stock, grip, and accessory details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, grip, and the rear end of the sight and rail system.
